entities.description: As a subsection of '引脚说明', this section provides an overview of the pin layout for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, detailing the physical arrangement and positioning of the pins.
Refers to the physical arrangement and layout of the pins on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, which is discussed in section 2.1.

relations.description: The concept of '引脚排列' is the primary topic of section 2.1.
